Peng Xian еҪӯзҫЎ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Peng Xian (еҪӯзҫЎ). Rejected by Liu Zhang but given office by Liu Bei. Peng Xian was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
